# MessageDirection enumeration

The two directions a message may travel at the JSON-RPC layer (spec §7.4).

```csharp
public enum MessageDirection
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| ClientToServer | `0` | A client sending to a server. |
| ServerToClient | `1` | A server sending to a client. |
